case_title: VIVIAN LEE VS. MARTIN LAM et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY LEE, VIVIAN AS TO DEFENDANT LAM, MARTIN KWOK, ANNIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-17-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-13-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAM, MARTIN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-17-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-17-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANT ANNIE KWOK WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. KIMBERLY FAN, DEFENDANT ANNIE KWOK'S SISTER INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON HER BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2011 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, VIVIAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LAM, MARTIN KWOK, ANNIE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
